text:
There’s something I need to address. I am the original and official organizer of the NYC Shih Tzu meetup, regardless of what’s been posted elsewhere.

Someone is attempting to take over and create confusion around the event. I have email receipts to support this if needed. Anyone is free to host their own meetup, but intentionally interfering with mine is not acceptable.

This has already caused confusion in the past, which I had to resolve myself. Showing up to my event and then trying to take it over immediately after is NOT okay. It’s disgusting, unethical and underhanded and it reveals your true character to the core.

My focus has always been on the Shih Tzu community, not monetization or personal promotion. To the culprit: Please do not involve yourself in my events moving forward. You are not welcome to attend.

#shihtzu #shihtzulovers #shihtzusofinstagram #nycshihtzumeetup
